---
title: "cmass_coor"
generated: true
description: "Alias for center_of_mass_points."
---

[‹ back to `nitrix.geometry.coords`](../nitrix-geometry-coords.qmd)

<!-- nitrix:gen sig:cmass_coor -->
`cmass_coor` is an alias for [`center_of_mass_points`](center_of_mass_points.qmd).
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->
